name: Huckleberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Pastry for a double crust pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Note: The apple does not alter the flavor, but stretches the precious berries.
2. Measure ingredients into a two-quart mixing bowl and mix well.
3. Pour into an unbaked pie shell.
4. Cover with top crust.
5. Bake at 375 degrees for about one hour or until nicely browned.
6. Makes one 9-inch pie.
